term: Two of Us Getting Back Together
englishDefinitions: The situation where two people in a relationship start dating or being together again after a breakup.
persianTranslation: دوباره با هم شدنِ ما دو نفر
examples: Everyone was surprised by the two of us getting back together.
She didn't expect the two of us getting back together after so long.
Talking honestly made the two of us getting back together possible.
